ddls:
CREATE TABLE "textgroups" (
  "textgroup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text group */,
  "textgroup_name" TEXT /* Name of the text group */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text group (e.g., Textgroups) */,
  "sort_field" TEXT /* Field used for sorting the text group */,
  "name_format" TEXT /* Format for the name of the text group */,
  "full_name_format" TEXT /* Format for the full name of the text group */,
  "annotation_format" TEXT /* Format for the annotation of the text group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the text group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the text group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the text group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the text group is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("textgroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "textsets" (
  "textset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text set */,
  "textset_name" TEXT /* Name of the text set */,
  "textgroup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text group the text set belongs to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text set (e.g., Textsets) */,
  "sort_field" TEXT /* Field used for sorting the text set */,
  "name_format" TEXT /* Format for the name of the text set */,
  "full_name_format" TEXT /* Format for the full name of the text set */,
  "annotation_format" TEXT /* Format for the annotation of the text set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the text set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the text set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the text set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the text set is active */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field for additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("textset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_textsets_textgroup_id FOREIGN KEY ("textgroup_id") REFERENCES textgroups ("textgroup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "text_name" TEXT /* Name of the text */,
  "textset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text set the text belongs to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text (e.g., Texts) */,
  "sort_field" TEXT /* Field used for sorting the text */,
  "name_format" TEXT /* Format for the name of the text */,
  "full_name_format" TEXT /* Format for the full name of the text */,
  "annotation_format" TEXT /* Format for the annotation of the text */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the text was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the text */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the text is active */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the text */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the text (in characters or words) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field for additional metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_textset_id FOREIGN KEY ("textset_id") REFERENCES textsets ("textset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "textlinks" (
  "textlink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text link */,
  "textlink_name" TEXT /* Name of the text link */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text link (e.g., Textlinks) */,
  "sort_field" TEXT /* Field used for sorting the text link */,
  "name_format" TEXT /* Format for the name of the text link */,
  "full_name_format" TEXT /* Format for the full name of the text link */,
  "annotation_format" TEXT /* Format for the annotation of the text link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the text link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the text link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the text link */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the text link is active */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., reference, citation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("textlink_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "codewords" (
  "codeword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each codeword */,
  "codeword_name" TEXT /* Name of the codeword */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the codeword (e.g., Codewords) */,
  "sort_field" TEXT /* Field used for sorting the codeword */,
  "name_format" TEXT /* Format for the name of the codeword */,
  "full_name_format" TEXT /* Format for the full name of the codeword */,
  "annotation_format" TEXT /* Format for the annotation of the codeword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the codeword */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the codeword was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the codeword */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the codeword is active */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the codeword (e.g., thematic, content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("codeword_id")
)
